task: Model B · distractor ranker · binary verification on expanded candidates
source: Counts read from distractor_confusion_dev.png and distractor_confusion_test.png (evaluate_distractor.py plots). Classes: 0 = Not distractor, 1 = Distractor.
ranking_at_3_note: Precision@3 / Recall@3 / F1@3 are not determined by the 2×2 matrix alone. Re-run `python src/evaluate_distractor.py --no-plots` to refresh; project report cites test F1@3 ≈ 0.54.
